hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== ESLint check ==="; npx eslint --max-warnings 0 src/ 2>&1; LINT_EXIT=$?; if [ $LINT_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"ESLint failed. Fix lint errors before committing.\"}"; exit 0; fi; echo "=== TypeScript type check ==="; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1; TSC_EXIT=$?; if [ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"TypeScript compilation failed. Fix type errors before committing.\"}"; exit 0; fi; echo "=== Unit tests with coverage ==="; npx vitest run --coverage --reporter=verbose 2>&1; TEST_EXIT=$?; if [ $TEST_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"Unit tests failed. Fix failing tests before committing.\"}"; exit 0; fi; COV=$(node -e "try{const r=JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"./coverage/coverage-summary.json\",\"utf8\"));const t=r.total;const p=Math.min(t.lines.pct,t.branches.pct,t.functions.pct,t.statements.pct);console.log(p)}catch(e){console.log(0)}"); PASS=$(node -e "console.log(Number($COV)>=99)"); if [ "$PASS" = "false" ]; then echo "{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"UT coverage is ${COV}%, below required 99%. Add more tests before committing.\"}"; exit 0; fi; echo "All pre-commit checks passed (coverage: ${COV}%)"'
hooks.statusMessage: Running pre-commit checks (eslint + tsc + UT coverage 99%)...

hooks.command: git diff --name-only | grep -q 'prisma/schema.prisma' && echo '{"systemMessage":"prisma/schema.prisma has changed. Run: npx prisma migrate dev --name <描述>"}' || true
